<!--
Portfolio PR template. Delete the italic prompt lines and fill in your own.
This template auto-loads when you `gh pr create` or open a PR through the web UI.
-->

## What changed?

_One-paragraph summary. What did you build or fix?_

## Why was this design chosen?

_Trade-offs, constraints, alternatives you rejected. If it was obvious, still say why._

## What is the fact-table grain? (for schema work)

_"One row = one _____." Skip if this PR doesn't touch fact tables._

## Which dimensions use which SCD Type? (for schema work)

_Type 1 / 2 / 4 per dimension changed, with a one-line justification each._

## What tests prove correctness?

_File paths to the queries or dbt tests + expected results. Screenshot if helpful._

## What trade-offs remain? / What would I do at scale?

_Honest gaps. What would you fix given another day? Recruiters value this more than a spotless PR._
